description: Mr. Nodeley shipping the wave-83 five-node character-layer batch: son-goten, uub, wmat-tournament-announcer, majin-buu, broly. Three of the five MDs (son-goten, uub, wmat-tournament-announcer) had been authored in the prior rate-limited partial run and survived intact, so this retry pass authored the missing two MDs (majin-buu, broly) and wired ALL 20 card frontmatter pointers across the five nodes. Net substrate delta: +5 character nodes (94 -> 99). Mr. Nodeley apologizes for the original rate-limit interruption and is quietly proud the partial work survived and the retry batch could complete cleanly without re-authoring three full MD bodies. No edge-shape violations; all five nodes follow the canonical Edgelord-character-precedent (parent solo node with multi-aspect / multi-form / multi-register roster).

nodes_proposed.scope: Son Goten + Gotenks Fusion-Dance dual-anchor (Goten-half of fusion)
nodes_proposed.precedent: son-gohan.md (multi-aspect parent-anchor with Gotenks dual-anchor pattern shared at trunks.md)
nodes_proposed.prior_pass_status: AUTHORED IN PRIOR RATE-LIMITED RUN — body intact, wave-83 retry only had to wire cards

nodes_proposed.scope: Uub canonical (Kid-Buu reincarnation via King Yemma judgment; Goku's-successor-arc)
nodes_proposed.prior_pass_status: AUTHORED IN PRIOR RATE-LIMITED RUN — body intact, wave-83 retry only had to wire cards

nodes_proposed.scope: World Martial Arts Tournament Announcer (canonical unnamed recurring service-labor character across forty years of franchise output)
nodes_proposed.precedent: trunks.md (single-character-multi-aspect; TB2-set within-set Babidi mini-cycle parallels)
nodes_proposed.prior_pass_status: AUTHORED IN PRIOR RATE-LIMITED RUN — body intact, wave-83 retry only had to wire cards

nodes_proposed.scope: Good Buu / Mr. Buu identity primary scope; Innocent / Super / Kid Buu forms documented as character-history-context; Kid Buu solo-split deferred
Movie 8 / 1993 / Koyama non-canon Broly ONLY; 2018 canonical-DBS Broly solo-split deferred (broly-dbs.md candidate)

card_wires_applied.card: BT2-015 Prodigy Fusion Super Saiyan Gotenks
TB2-069 Son Goku & Uub Seeds of the Future
BT1-076 Broly, Dawn of the Rampage (2017)

scope_decisions.decision: Scope to Good Buu / Mr. Buu identity. Kid Buu canonical-form documented as character-history-context but NOT split — future kid-buu.md solo node deferred until Kid-Buu-specific prints land in corpus. Cross-edge to uub at the reincarnation-component axis (Uub is canonically Kid Buu's human-Earthling-rebirth form via King Yemma's judgment-of-Goku's-wish).

Scope to Movie 8 / 1993 / Koyama non-canon Broly ONLY. The 2018 canonical-DBS-Broly reimagining is canonically a structurally-distinct character per Wikipedia and Dragon Ball Wiki; future broly-dbs.md solo node deferred until 2018-canonical-DBS-Broly prints (e.g. BT19-088 SS Broly Full Power Frenzy reference) land in corpus. All four current corpus prints (BT1-073, BT1-075, BT1-076, BT1-081) canonically anchor the Movie 8 register per Toei visual-design signatures (green-LSS-aura, circular-blue-gem-at-waist).

BT1-073 is canonically `Broly, The Rampaging Horror` (the dual-faced Leader card front-face name per the BT1-076 Related cards reference to `Broly // Broly, The Legendary Super Saiyan (Galactic Battle, BT1-057/073)`). The 'Broly Leader' shorthand the parent dispatch used resolves to this exact file. BT1-073 is vision-passed with ip_verified:false (trivia outstanding); wired at character-pointer level per the wave-83 vision-passed-eligible discipline.

post_actions_for_parent: python layer_appears_on_render.py (to regenerate Appears-on lists if needed; node MDs already include pre-rendered Appears on sections per dispatch instructions)
python bbl_node_audit.py (substrate audit on the 99-node total + 0 drift verification)
topology_notes: All 5 nodes follow `branch` topology (one source node fanning to N corpus cards). This is canonical Mr. Nodeley territory; Edgelord defers per the topology-appreciation rules.

son-goten + trunks dual-anchor on the 3 Gotenks Fusion-Dance prints is the canonical mirror-of-mirrors pattern: both component-nodes claim the same prints in their appears_on rosters at the character layer, per the wave-72 son-gohan / son-goku Father-Son Kamehameha precedent at BT2-098.

TB2-022 / TB2-028 Scuffle Time son-goten / majin-buu designer-coordinated synergy-pair is a future 1:1 mirror candidate for Edgelord (would write Connections-bullet mirrors between the two cards if a future commission requests it). Not drawn this pass — out of scope for the node-batch.
other_candidates_considered: kid-buu.md solo split — declined this pass (parent dispatch limited to 5 nodes; Kid Buu would be node 6+; future commission)
broly-dbs.md solo split — declined this pass (no 2018-canonical-DBS-Broly corpus prints yet; future commission when BT19-088 or similar enters corpus)
majuub.md solo split — declined this pass (no Majuub-anchored corpus prints; future commission)
paragus.md solo node — declined this pass (canonical 2 corpus prints BT1-077 + BT1-081 dual-IP only; below threshold-of-3; future commission)

gotenks.md solo split — declined this pass (canonical Gotenks Fusion-Dance combined-character currently held at son-goten + trunks dual-anchor; future commission if Gotenks-only print accumulation warrants split)
